description: bats_tmp_dir creates sandbox, sets BATS_TMP_DIR, does not return path
steps: Load the helper in a bats test
Call bats_tmp_dir in setup()
Assert $BATS_TMP_DIR is set and the directory exists
Assert the path matches /tmp/oroshi/bats/<file>/<slug>

description: bats_git_dir creates a git repo on branch main with initial commit
steps: Call bats_git_dir in setup()
Assert $BATS_GIT_DIR is set and the directory exists
Assert git -C $BATS_GIT_DIR branch --show-current outputs 'main'
Assert git -C $BATS_GIT_DIR log --oneline outputs one commit with message 'init'

description: bats_git_dir accepts a custom name and creates the repo under that name
steps: Call local repo=$(bats_git_dir 'upstream')
Assert the returned path ends with /upstream
Assert the directory exists and is a git repo

description: bats_git_dir auto-creates sandbox if bats_tmp_dir was not called first
steps: Do NOT call bats_tmp_dir in setup()
Call bats_git_dir directly
Assert $BATS_TMP_DIR is set (auto-created)
Assert $BATS_GIT_DIR is set inside $BATS_TMP_DIR

description: bats_git_worktree creates a linked worktree and sets both BATS_GIT_WORKTREES and OROSHI_WORKTREES_DIR
steps: Call bats_git_dir then bats_git_worktree 'feature'
Assert the worktree directory exists at $BATS_TMP_DIR/worktrees/feature
Assert $BATS_GIT_WORKTREES equals $BATS_TMP_DIR/worktrees/
Assert $OROSHI_WORKTREES_DIR equals $BATS_GIT_WORKTREES

description: bats_mock serializes functions to mock.zsh and unsets them from scope
steps: Define a function my_dep() { echo 'real'; } in a test
Call bats_mock my_dep
Assert $BATS_TMP_DIR/mock.zsh contains the function definition
Assert calling my_dep directly in the test fails (function unset)

description: bats_run_function and bats_run_script both inject mocks before executing
steps: Define a mock for an autoloaded function and call bats_mock
Call bats_run_function targeting a function that calls the mocked dependency
Assert the mock output appears in $output, not the real function output
Repeat with bats_run_script

description: bats_strip_ansi removes ANSI escape codes from a string
steps: Call bats_strip_ansi with a string containing \e[32m color codes
Assert the output contains no escape sequences
Assert the plain text content is preserved
Call bats_tmp_dir to create sandbox
Call bats_cleanup
Assert the directory no longer exists

description: All Tier 0 tests pass after the helper rewrite
steps: Run bats on all text-*.bats, slugify.bats, bats-test-path.bats
Assert all tests pass with no failures

description: All Tier 1 tests pass with the new helper (better-rm, ralph-end)
steps: Run bats on better-rm.bats and ralph-end.bats
Assert all tests pass
Assert neither file references bats_tmp, TMP_DIRECTORY, or run_zsh_script

description: All Tier 2 tests pass with the new helper (git repo and worktree tests)
steps: Run bats on all git-github-*.bats, git-file-list-dirty-raw.bats, review-diff.bats, git-worktree-*.bats, complete-git-worktrees*.bats, prompt/index.zsh.bats
Assert all tests pass
Assert no file contains manual git init boilerplate or run_zsh_fn

description: All Tier 3 tests pass with bats_mock replacing previous mock mechanisms
steps: Run bats on ralph.bats, review.bats, git-worktree-create.bats
Assert all tests pass
Assert review.bats contains no ZDOTDIR manipulation
Assert git-worktree-create.bats creates no executable mock files in PATH

description: All Tier 4 tests pass with the new helper (prompt tests)
steps: Run bats on prompt/git.zsh.bats and prompt/path.zsh.bats
Assert all tests pass
Assert no file references old helper names
